mapper.sql: a.er_id, a.acft_type_cd, a.afbr_val, a.afbr_unit, a.use_bgng_dt, a.use_end_dt, a.frst_reg_dt, a.frst_reg_user_id, a.last_chg_dt, a.last_chg_user_id
mapper.select: SELECT FROM er.tn_er_afbr a WHERE a.er_id = #{erId} AND NOW() BETWEEN a.use_bgng_dt AND a.use_end_dt ORDER BY a.acft_type_cd ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO er.tn_er_afbr (er_id, acft_type_cd, afbr_val, afbr_unit, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{erId}, #{acftTypeCd}, #{afbrVal}, #{afbrUnit}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})

INSERT INTO er.tn_er_afbr (er_id, acft_type_cd, afbr_val, afbr_unit, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) SELECT #{dstErId}, acft_type_cd, afbr_val, afbr_unit, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{userId}, NOW(), #{userId} FROM er.tn_er_afbr WHERE er_id = #{srcErId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
